title: sympy.explore.params
description: Parameters for the sympy.explore MCP method. Perform symbolic operations using SymPy.

expr.description: Expression to analyze using SymPy (string form).

goals.description: List of symbolic goals to perform (order may matter).

variables.description: Optional list of variable names relevant to `solve` or other goals.

timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for this operation (optional; server enforces global caps).
